data.title: Scaffold sprint skill evals (generate-skill-eval.sh sprint)
data.description:
## Context
Story 1826-b0ee: Sprint skill has no evals/promptfooconfig.yaml. Before adding a RED eval test for gap classification, the scaffold must be created.

## What To Do
Run the eval scaffolding tool to create the initial promptfoo configuration for the sprint skill:
```bash
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
bash "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/generate-skill-eval.sh" sprint
```

This creates `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` with boilerplate structure.

After scaffolding, verify the file was created and is valid YAML. Do NOT add any test cases yet — that is done in the next task.

If generate-skill-eval.sh is unavailable or fails, manually create a minimal `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`:
```yaml
description: "Sprint skill evals"

providers:
  - id: "anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"

defaultTest:
  options:
    provider: "anthropic:messages:claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"

prompts:
  - |
    You are the sprint orchestrator skill for a software development workflow tool.
    {{prompt}}

tests: []
```

## Files to Create
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` (new)

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Evals directory and file exist
```
Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml && echo PASS
```

### AC2: File is valid YAML
```
Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))" && echo PASS
```

### AC3: File contains providers section
```
Verify: grep -q 'providers' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml && echo PASS
```
